---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the prompts, workflow, or ATS logic
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Where**
Which doc/prompt/step (e.g. `standardprompt_v2.md` step N, ATS keyword bank, checklist).

**Additional context**
Redact any personal CV/application content.
